text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Good job, <chrname>! Wow, I'm so
proud of you! ☆

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aha, I know! Now's the perfect time for some
acupuncture!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try activating a few of your chakra
points? Don't worry, I'll be reeeal gentle.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be able to do a perfect job in my
current state! You're in, right? Then it's settled!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Just relaaax, and leave everything in my capable
hands! ☆
